channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Norway’s Record Olympic Medal Haul Is a Welcome Distraction From Scandal  The New York Times

  4. Olympic medal count: How many gold medals has Team USA won?  NBC News
  5. Norway (population: 5.7m) beats US (342m) to top Winter Olympics medal table  The Guardian

item.title: JPMorgan Closed Trump Accounts After January 6, Court Filing Shows - Forbes
item.description:
1. JPMorgan Closed Trump Accounts After January 6, Court Filing Shows  Forbes

  3. JPMorgan says it closed Trump's bank accounts a month after Jan. 6 attack  Reuters
  4. JPMorgan Chase pushes back on Trump’s $5 billion lawsuit, arguing it ‘fraudulently’ includes Jamie Dimon  CNN
  5. JPMorgan concedes it closed Trump's accounts after Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol  CNBC

item.title: Jordan Stolz's bid for another Olympic gold medal ends as Dutch speedskaters win mass start - CBS News
item.description:
1. Jordan Stolz's bid for another Olympic gold medal ends as Dutch speedskaters win mass start  CBS News
  2. Jordan Stolz misses out on 4th Olympic speedskating medal  ESPN
  3. From the sports desk: An epic finale awaits  NBC News
  4. Winter Olympics 2026: Jordan Stolz barely misses podium in chaotic mass start  Yahoo Sports
  5. Jordan Stolz, with three medals, has stamped himself one of the biggest Olympic stars  The New York Times

item.title: Cowboys, Javonte Williams agree to terms on 3 year, $24 million contract - Dallas Cowboys | Official Site of the Dallas Cowboys
item.description:
1. Cowboys, Javonte Williams agree to terms on 3 year, $24 million contract  Dallas Cowboys | Official Site of the Dallas Cowboys
  2. Sources: Cowboys agree to three-year deal with RB Williams  ESPN
  3. Cowboys, RB Javonte Williams agree to terms on three-year, $24 million contract extension  NFL.com
  4. Javonte Williams deal underscores realities of running back market  NBC Sports
  5. Cowboys reportedly re-sign RB Javonte Williams to 3-year deal worth $24M  Yahoo Sports
item.source: Dallas Cowboys | Official Site of the Dallas Cowboys

item.title: Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine - PBS
item.description:
1. Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine  PBS

  4. Ukraine war latest: UK will ‘make 2026 the year war ends’ after vow to deploy troops  The Independent
